title: Auction of State Government Securities
description: The following State Governments have offered to sell stock by way of auction, for an aggregate amount of ₹18,159 Crore (Face Value). Sr. No. State Amount to be raised (₹ Crore) Tenor (Year) Type of Auction 1. Andhra Pradesh 2200 12 Yield 2200 25 Yield 2. Himachal Pradesh 900 10 Yield 3. Maharashtra 800 05 Yield 1600 13 Yield 1200 23 Yield 4. Meghalaya 259 10 Yield 5. Punjab 1500 10 Yield 6. Rajasthan 600 Re-issue of 7.33% Rajasthan SGS 2031, issued on March 25, 2026 Price 1200 17 Yie
